title: NANA Mourns the Passing of Congressman Don Young
summary: NANA was saddened to hear of the passing of Congressman Don Young, our country’s longest-serving member of Congress. Since his election in 1973, Don Young has represented Alaska’s interests with dedication and heart. “Don Young deeply cared for Alaska and was a champion for us all,” said Piquk Linda...

title: In Memoriam: U.S. Congressman Don Young
summary: BSNC deeply mourns the passing of U.S. Congressman Don Young. Congressman Young was the longest-serving member of the House of Representatives and of Congress in history, having represented Alaska for 25 terms. “Don Young was my Congressman for life and his legacy advocating for Alaska will always b...

title: ANCSA Regional Association and Alaska Native Village Corporation Association mourn the loss of Congressman Don Young
